title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Wormwood essential oils helps with cough because of its potent antimicrobial properties that combat respiratory infections, reducing congestion and inflammation. The oil's natural expectorant properties help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, making it easier to expel phlegm and relieve a persistent cough.
